name: Extreme Top-of-Book Imbalance (h=50)
hypothesis: An almost complete monopoly of volume on the bid side of the book (OBI > 0.99) is an overwhelmingly strong predictor of a near-term price increase, and this signal should persist for at least 50 ticks (approx. 5 seconds).
mutation_note: Per feedback analyst suggestion to `tighten_threshold`, pushed threshold from 0.98 to 0.99 to test the performance ceiling of this extremely strong signal.
